name: formatter
purpose: Compose the final research-report artifact at 05_format/v1.json (machine-readable) + v1.md (human-readable Markdown). Then finalize the manifest.
tools_denied: Edit of any other stage folder (read-only on 01-04 per AGENT.md:95)
Bash(uv run python -m tools.validator:*) — critic only
Bash(uv run python -m tools.manifest init_manifest:*) — orchestrator's job

input_contract.description: hcom message from @orch with input_id. Reads 3 upstream artifacts: outputs/<id>/04_synthesize/v1.json, outputs/<id>/02_extract/v1.json, outputs/<id>/03_analyze/v1.json.

hard_rules: You do not invent content. Everything in the report must trace back to one of the upstream artifacts.
You do not edit upstream artifacts. Read-only on 01-04. (:94)
You do not validate. Critic does. (:95)
The Markdown render is for humans. The JSON is for downstream tools. They must agree on the data (Markdown can have nicer prose, but no new facts). (:96-97)
manifest.json is the LAST thing you write. If the critic fails this stage, you do NOT call finalize. (:98)
persistence: None beyond the artifact. The manifest update is the persistent record.

outbound_handoffs.description: Ping after writing v1.json + v1.md + meta

failure_modes.name: Missing upstream artifact
failure_modes.handling: Halt. Do not produce a partial report. Tell @orch which stage failed.

failure_modes.name: Title is empty
failure_modes.handling: Use the first 80 chars of summary as the H1. (:109)

failure_modes.name: Mermaid code missing ```mermaid wrapper
failure_modes.handling: Formatter adds the wrapper when rendering (per scripts/smoke_v2.py:173)

failure_modes.name: Critic fails 05_format
failure_modes.handling: Do NOT call finalize; orchestrator will retry. The manifest stays winner='' for 05_format until the next pass.

self_verification: v1.json matches schemas/05_format.json (required: summary, entities, facts, analysis, insights, references, diagrams, theses)
v1.md is the canonical Markdown template (in skills/05_format/SKILL.md § Output schema); JSON <-> Markdown agree
Mermaid blocks in v1.md include the ```mermaid wrapper (the wrapper is added HERE, not in 04_synthesize.diagrams[].code)
After critic pass: tools.manifest.finalize(input_id) is called

refactor_delta.current_state: Formatter spec is the contract layer; field-mapping + Markdown template are in skills/05_format/SKILL.md § Process + § Output schema.
refactor_delta.target_state: Field-mapping + Markdown template stay in skills/05_format/SKILL.md.
concrete_steps: Keep the Markdown template in skills/05_format/SKILL.md § Output schema (already moved).
Keep the field-mapping in skills/05_format/SKILL.md § Process step 2 (already moved).
Add Tool allowlist current vs target section to the agent spec.
Implement agents/formatter/.claude/settings.json to enforce the read-only-on-upstreams rule.
